name: THANATOPHORIC DYSPLASIA
definition: sporadic lethal skeletal dysplasia characterized by severe rhizomelia (micromelic dwarfism)

demographics.Genetics: autosomal dominant mutation of gene-encoding fibroblast growth factor receptor 3

dominant_finding: disproportionately large head with short base of skull + prominent forehead
distribution: not extending beyond anterior axillary line
discriminating_features: disproportionately large head with short base of skull + prominent forehead
narrow chest with normal trunk length

general: disproportionately large head with short base of skull + prominent forehead
Chest radiograph (PATHOGNOMONIC): narrow chest with normal trunk length
not extending beyond anterior axillary line
Spine: reduction of interpediculate space of last few lumbar vertebrae
extreme generalized platyspondyly = severe H- / U-shaped vertebra plana
Pelvis (hypoplastic iliac bones): iliac wings small + square (vertical shortening but wide horizontally)
Extremities: metaphyseal flaring = "telephone handle" appearance of long bones
short-limbed dwarfism with extremely short + bowed "telephone receiver"-like femurs
extremely small hypoplastic thorax with short ribs + narrowed in anteroposterior
macrocrania with frontal bossing ± hydrocephalus (increased HC÷AC ratio)

clinical.Prognosis: often stillborn; uniformly fatal within a few hours / days after birth ← respiratory
